name: Degen the Otter
description: $Degen (Degen the Otter) is a brand-new Solana-based meme coin launched very recently on pump.fun (as of late December 2025). It draws inspiration from the viral cute otter content on TikTok, aiming to capitalize on animal meme trends like Moo Deng or PNUT.Key details:Contract Address (CA): 4Nc2EhF8vqXcjHpbUevYZv9Bv4aKb4fWi7cju7c2pump Launched from a very low market cap (~$2.5K) and quickly pumped to over $200K+ in early trading, driven by community raids and call groups on X. The project claims strong owner involvement: The TikTok/Instagram profiles (associated with the famous otter marcelldegen) , with millions of followers) have updated to include this CA, and the pump.fun developer fee wallet has been transferred to the TikTok owner's wallet for transparency and marketing support.
